user_story: As an HR admin, I want to configure which personal and contact detail fields carry over on rehire, so that returning employees' basic data is reused correctly
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Rehire Settings screen; When I select fields on the Personal Details and Contact Details tabs and Save; Then those fields are configured for rehire

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to configure academic details, work experience and skills for rehire, so that a returning employee's professional history is retained
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Rehire Settings screen; When I configure the Academic Details, Work Experience and Skills tabs and Save; Then those sections are set for rehire

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to configure employee verification and orientation for rehire, so that onboarding steps are handled appropriately for returning employees
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Rehire Settings screen; When I configure the Employee Verification and Orientation tabs and Save; Then those steps are set for rehire

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to save and continue through the rehire configuration tabs, so that I can complete the setup in sequence
acceptance_criteria: Given I have configured a rehire tab; When I click Save & Next; Then the settings are saved and the next tab opens
